note: These seeds are FROZEN. Changing a seed after the baseline run is an OWNER_GATE — stop and surface it, never silently edit.
governance: The identical-retest contract requires the retest to use the SAME seed as the baseline. Changing the seed after seeing baseline results invalidates the comparison.

primary.description: Primary baseline and retest cohort seed. Same seed used for baseline and every retest — delta is from the adaptation, not sample variance.

funnel_schema: docs/atm-415 per-app procedures — each app defines its own funnel probabilities for video/sticker/collectible in its cohort-runner call
